_note: Dependency DAG of Linear B label sources. Two labels are NOT independent consensus if they share an upstream node. Used to gate LF_CROSS_SOURCE_CONCORDANCE (§V) and the dependency-aware label model WS3.

PRIMARY_EDITIONS.desc: ed. pr. of each tablet (KT, PTT, TITHEMY, Thebes eds.) — the physical readings

DECIPHERMENT_1952.desc: Ventris 1952 phonetic values — the shared reading basis

AURA_JORRO_DMIC.note: explicitly builds on and cites Ventris-Chadwick + eds. -> NOT independent of them

STRUCTURAL_RULES.desc: deterministic structure-only rules (numeral->quantity, logogram->commodity, total-position->document-structure) — the ONLY genuinely edition-independent role signal

rulings.cross_source_concordance_independent_onl: sources are in different independence_classes; e.g. STRUCTURAL_RULES agreeing with a lexicon IS informative; DMic agreeing with V-C is NOT (shared upstream)
rulings.silver_a_from_structure: STRUCTURAL_RULES may yield SILVER_A for the TRIVIAL classes (numeral/logogram/total) since they are edition-independent
rulings.silver_a_from_lexicon_requires: a lexical role (PLACE/HUMAN) reaches SILVER_A only if the underlying reading is uncontested in the ed. pr. AND the index membership is uncontested; otherwise SILVER_B
rulings.no_false_consensus: never count DAMOS+VC+DMic agreement as 3 independent votes — collapse to 1 SHARED_DECIPHERMENT vote
